zh.lifeSummary: 當Walther Von Klingen於1220年出生在瑞士瑟爾高時，他的父親Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN30歲，母親Richenza VON HOHENBERG26歲。他和Sophie von Froburg至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。他於1269年在瑞士巴瑟爾-斯塔特被列為minnesänger。他去世於1286年3月1日在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Klingen, Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Germ: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 艾其哈-福利德格艾其哈賀可林根
zh-hans.Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Switzerl: 瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walther Von Klingen于1220年出生在瑞士瑟爾高时，他的父亲Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN30岁，母亲Richenza VON HOHENBERG26岁。他和Sophie von Froburg至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。他于1269年在瑞士巴瑟爾-斯塔特被列为minnesänger。他去世于1286年3月1日在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Klingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Erwin, Benno, Brunhilde, Dieter, Eldor, Erhard, Ernst, Ewald, Fritz.
habitational name for someone from Klinge (see   Klinge  ). This surname (in any of the possible senses; see also below) is also found in France (mainly Alsace), Poland, and Czechia.

variants.name: Klinge
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley or ravine, or near a mountain stream, Middle High German klinge ‘murmuring brook’. There are many places called with this word, and the surname may also be a habitational name from any of them.

North German: topographic name for someone living near a ford or on boggy moorland, from Low German klinge ‘ford, muddy heath’, or a habitational name from Klinge in Schleswig-Holstein, Klingen, or any of several other places containing the element klinge ‘ford’.
German and Danish: metonymic occupational name for a cutler or swordsmith, from Middle High German klinge ‘metal blade, sword’ (a late derivative of klingen ‘to ring or clatter’).

variants.name: Klingerman
meanings: Americanized form of German Klingermann: variant of Klinger .

nameMeanings.name: Walther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

variants.name: Walter
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Walther Von Klingen was born in 1220, in Thurgau, Switzerland, his father, Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN, was 30 and his mother, Richenza VON HOHENBERG, was 26. He had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Sophie von Froburg. In 1269, his occupation is listed as minnesänger in Basel-Stadt, Switzerland. He died on 1 March 1286, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walther Von Klingen est né en 1220, à Turgovie, Suisse, son père, Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Richenza VON HOHENBERG, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Sophie von Froburg. En 1269, sa profession de son indiquée est minnesänger à Bâle-Ville, Suisse. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1286, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Klingen, Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Germ: Klingen, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Walther Von Klingen 1220 in Thurgau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN 30 und seine Mutter Richenza VON HOHENBERG 26. Er hatte mit Sophie von Froburg mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1269 ist sein Beruf als minnesänger in Basel-Stadt, Schweiz aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. März 1286 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walther Von Klingen è nato il nel 1220 nel Turgovia, Svizzera, il suo padre, Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Richenza VON HOHENBERG, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Sophie von Froburg. Nel 1269, la sua occupazione è indicata come minnesänger nel Basilea-Città, Svizzera. Morì il 1 marzo 1286, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walther Von Klingenが1220年にスイススウルガウで生まれた時，父Ulrich III. VON KLINGENは30歳，母Richenza VON HOHENBERGは26歳であった。彼はSophie von Froburgとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。1269年，スイスバセル-スタトでの職業はminnesängerと記録されている。彼は1286年3月1日に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walther Von Klingen(이)가 1220년 스위스 스르가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza VON HOHENBERG(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Sophie von Froburg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1269년, 그의 직업은 스위스 바셀-스타드트에서 minnesänger이었다. 그는 1286년 3월 1일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walther Von Klingen nasceu em 1220, em Thurgau, Suiça, seu pai, Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Richenza VON HOHENBERG, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Sophie von Froburg. Em 1269, sua profissão aparece como minnesänger em Basel-Stadt, Suiça. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1286, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.Klingen, Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Germ: клинген, эичач, ландкрис эичач-фриедбирг, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walther Von Klingen родился в 1220 г. в местности тургау, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Ulrich III. VON KLINGEN было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza VON HOHENBERG, 26. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Sophie von Froburg. В 1269 году он работал по профессии minnesänger в местности беисел-стадт, Швейцария. Он умер 1 марта 1286 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Sophie von Froburg. En 1269, su ocupación registrada era minnesänger en Basel-Stadt, Suiza. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1286, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
